design_philosophy.description: A high-end, data-driven 'Control Room' interface blending Deep Navy and Void Black with Electric Cyan and Royal Blue glows. Emphasizes geometric simplicity, strict grids, and terminal-inspired aesthetics over generic SaaS layouts. The glow is earned through interactions.

buttons.primary: bg-[#0088FF] text-white hover:bg-[#00F5FF] hover:text-[#050510] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(0,245,255,0.6)] transition-all duration-300 font-medium rounded-sm border border-[#00F5FF]/50
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-[#00F5FF] border border-[#0088FF]/50 hover:border-[#00F5FF] hover:shadow-[0_0_10px_rgba(0,136,255,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 rounded-sm

inputs.base: bg-[#030712] border border-[#0088FF]/40 text-white rounded-sm focus:border-[#00F5FF] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00F5FF] transition-all placeholder:text-slate-600

sidebar.link_active: border-l-2 border-[#00F5FF] bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00F5FF]/10 to-transparent text-[#00F5FF]

visual_enhancers.micro_interactions: All interactive elements MUST have a state change. Text color shifts to Cyan, borders illuminate on hover/focus.

auth_background.description: Abstract futuristic digital grid background in deep navy blue and pure black, subtle electric cyan glowing lines intersecting

dashboard_hero.description: High-end abstract data visualization, glowing cyan and royal blue nodes

bot_avatar_placeholder.description: Futuristic robot head with glowing red triangle symbol, to be used as default bot persona avatar.

page_specific_instructions.auth_pages: Login/Register/Verify/Forgot: Split screen layout. Left side: Form with sharp inputs. Right side: auth_background image with a dark gradient overlay (bg-gradient-to-r from-[#030712] to-transparent) so it blends seamlessly.
page_specific_instructions.admin_sidebar: Deep navy background with instance switcher at the top. Use JetBrains Mono for instance names. Active states have neon cyan left-borders.
page_specific_instructions.dashboard_overview: Top section uses bento grid for stats (Instances, Users, Messages). Recharts for analytics using cyan/blue strokes on transparent backgrounds.
page_specific_instructions.knowledge_base: Upload area styled as a dropzone with dashed cyan border, glowing on drag-over. Document list uses tight data tables.
page_specific_instructions.bot_settings: Form sections categorized in cards with subtle glowing borders. Persona editor includes a preview panel resembling a terminal window.
page_specific_instructions.conversations_and_users: Data tables using Shadcn. Dark rows, cyan hover state (hover:bg-[#00F5FF]/10). Dense grid layout.
page_specific_instructions.analytics: Recharts with heavy customization: hide generic grids, use solid horizontal gridlines (rgba(0,136,255,0.1)), neon strokes, and glowing tooltips.
page_specific_instructions.discord_settings: Discord blue (#5865F2) mixed with the Tron theme. Dedicated card layout for Webhook/Bot Token setups.
page_specific_instructions.embed_generator: Code block styled using a dark terminal aesthetic (bg-[#030712], border-[#0088FF]/30) with JetBrains Mono font. Include a 'Copy' button with cyan hover.
page_specific_instructions.chat_widget: Floating action button with cyan pulse animation. When expanded, an edge-to-edge dark chat interface with neon blue message bubbles (User) and dark gray (Bot).
page_specific_instructions.standalone_chat: Full-screen interface. Sidebar for history, main chat area uses a sleek, cardless message list. Focus on readability with high contrast typography.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure pure white text on dark navy backgrounds meets APCA standards. Cyan text should be reserved for larger accents, borders, or high-contrast states.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: Add `data-testid` to all forms, submit buttons, navigation links, and settings toggles (e.g., `data-testid='login-submit-button'`, `data-testid='nav-dashboard'`).
